texto: Often people attempt to live their lives backwards: they try to have more things, or more money, in order to do more of what they want so that they will be happier. The way it actually works is the reverse. You must first be who you really are, then, do what you need to do, in order to have what you want.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Margaret Young sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Often people attempt to live their lives backwards: they try to have more things, or more money, …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, be-yourself, order, útil em momentos de trabalho e reflexao.

texto: Climbing is as close as we can come to flying.
explicacao: Citação de Margaret Young sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Climbing is as close as we can come to flying.” articula reflexao, climbing, flying em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como flying e mountain.
